Publications with Ido Feldman



1. Ido Feldman , Miguel Moreno , Fodor space in generalized descriptive set theory. Preprint.
Abstract. We study the continuous reducibility of isomorphism relations in the space of regresive functions in k^k. We show for inaccessible k, that if T is a theory with less than k non-isomorphic models of size k and T' is unstable or superstable non-classifiable, then the isomorphism of models of T is continuous reducible to the isomorphism of models of T'$.
PDF - arXiv


miguelmath 2026
